pending.empty: No tasks are waiting for a date.
guide.pending.description: Tasks and projects that do not have a specific start date yet.
guide.pending.title: Pending
guide.area.description: A long-term responsibility with no finish line, such as Work, Health, or Family. It can contain projects and standalone tasks.
guide.area.title: Area
guide.completed.description: A chronological record of completed or canceled tasks and projects.
guide.completed.title: Completed
guide.deleted.description: The entry for removed content. The current version does not yet support restoring deleted items.
guide.deleted.title: Deleted
guide.inbox.description: A temporary landing place for thoughts and tasks you have not organized yet.
guide.inbox.title: Inbox
guide.intro: Unthink separates when you will act from where work belongs. Use the system lists to decide timing, and use areas and projects only when organization adds clarity.
guide.organization.description: Use areas and projects to describe how work belongs together. Create them from New in the bottom-left corner, and they will appear in the sidebar.
guide.organization.title: Areas, projects, and tasks
guide.project.description: A result that can be completed, such as Launch the website. Use headings to divide a larger project into stages.
guide.project.title: Project
guide.schedule.description: Tasks and projects with a future start date, arranged as a forward-looking plan.
guide.schedule.title: Schedule
guide.systemLists.description: These lists are different views of your tasks, not seven folders that require manual duplication.
guide.systemLists.title: When will I handle it?
guide.task.description: A task is one actionable step. Add subtasks when that step needs a short checklist, without creating another project.
guide.task.title: Task and subtask
guide.title: User Guide
guide.today.description: Tasks you intend to handle today, including items that start or are due today.
guide.today.title: Today
guide.view.description: A View does not move or duplicate tasks. It saves a filter, such as overdue tasks, work-tagged tasks, or items due this week.
guide.view.sectionDescription: Areas and projects answer where a task belongs. Views answer which tasks you want to see together.
guide.view.title: Views
guide.workflow.capture.description: Put a new thought in Inbox without stopping to organize it.
guide.workflow.capture.title: Capture first
guide.workflow.decide.description: Choose Today, a future date, or Pending according to whether the task has a date.
guide.workflow.decide.title: Decide when
guide.workflow.organize.description: Move outcome-related tasks into a project, then place the project in an area if needed.
guide.workflow.organize.title: Organize when useful
guide.workflow.review.description: Clear Inbox, review upcoming work, and assign dates to Pending tasks when needed.
guide.workflow.review.title: Review regularly
guide.workflow.title: A simple workflow
